averzian.title: Imperator Averzian
averzian.blackening_desc: Max HP Debuff (1 stack = swap). Swap as soon as the other tank is clear.
averzian.positioning_desc: Keep boss away from Dark Tears (the +75% dmg buff is deadly).
averzian.umbral_desc: Aim impact at a Voidshaper to break its shield.
averzian.big_heals_desc: During Umbral Collapse soak explosion (6s ticking dot).
averzian.dark_upheaval_desc: Constant periodic damage on the whole raid.
averzian.rule_2_3_desc: Raid can destroy 2 adds via soaks; the 3rd will always capture its zone.
averzian.utility_desc: DKs (Grips) and stuns are crucial for Voidmaw at 35% HP.
averzian.gathering_desc: Kill the Voidshaper before it reaches 100 energy (Wipe).
averzian.bloodlust_desc: On Pull. Blast the boss before the room is full.
averzian.grid_management_desc: The raid can destroy 2 adds per wave via Tank soaks. The 3rd will capture its zone.
averzian.priority_desc: Prioritize blocking zones that threaten to form a line of 3 (Tic-Tac-Toe).
averzian.forces_desc: Averzian never fights alone. He summons his armies via **Void Rifts** and **Dark Tears**.
averzian.oblivion_desc: Soak the zones (8m circle) to reduce raid damage. Constant movement required.

vorasius.title: Vorasius
vorasius.smashed_desc: Swap at the first stack of Shadowclaw Slam. The boss hits very hard.
vorasius.aftershock_desc: Stand in the center of the impact after the explosion. Ranged: stay far back to outrange the rings.
vorasius.primordial_roar_desc: Soft enrage. The Gathering Void DoT stacks on every cast.
vorasius.parasite_expulsion_desc: Massive raid damage spike when adds spawn.
vorasius.dispels_desc: Dispel the dmg increase debuff on players hit by add explosions.
vorasius.wall_break_desc: Melee on the left wall, Ranged on the right wall. Move out of the explosion circle! (+50% shadow dmg debuff).
vorasius.void_breath_desc: Watch which hand glows to anticipate the starting side of the sweep (targets 3 players).
vorasius.utility_desc: Use Grips / Typhoons / Rings of Peace to bring adds to walls.
vorasius.bloodlust_desc: On Pull. Take advantage of the relative calm to burn the boss.
vorasius.wall_break_tactics_desc: The key mechanic. Blistercreeps MUST die **on** a crystal wall.
vorasius.anticipation_desc: Watch Vorasius' glowing hand to know where Void Breath starts.
vorasius.pression_desc: Vorasius slams the ground regularly, dealing heavy physical damage and stunning the raid for 2 seconds.
vorasius.spawns_desc: Pustules appear on Vorasius' body, bursting to release **Blistercreeps**.

salhadaar.title: Salhadaar
salhadaar.shattering_twilight_desc: Impact spawns spikes. Move away from raid BEFORE impact.
salhadaar.kiting_desc: Move boss away from Concentrated Void orbs to buy time for DPS.
salhadaar.despotic_command_desc: Dispel players ONLY when they are at the edge of the room.
salhadaar.heal_absorb_desc: Heal the player intensely after dispel to clear the absorb.
salhadaar.focus_orbs_desc: Spawn zones light up. Kill orbs ONE BY ONE. Never kill them simultaneously (Dark Radiation).
salhadaar.bloodlust_dps_desc: Use BL during Unbound Phase (+25% damage taken by boss).
salhadaar.despotic_dps_desc: If you have the pink circle, run IMMEDIATELY to the room edge.
salhadaar.fractured_images_desc: ABSOLUTE priority on interrupts to avoid filling the room with void.
salhadaar.bloodlust_global_desc: Unbound Phase. Boss takes +25% damage, time to send all burst.
salhadaar.orb_management_desc: Never kill multiple orbs simultaneously (Heroic). Wait for raid DoT to expire.
salhadaar.void_zones_desc: If you have a circle (Despotic Command), place it on edges to keep center clean.
salhadaar.positioning_desc: Tanks, aim Shattering Twilight towards edges to avoid cluttering center.
salhadaar.unbound_desc: Salhadaar gains energy passively. At 100 Energy, he enters **Entropic Unraveling**.
salhadaar.phase_normal_desc: Pulls Concentrated Void orbs towards him from edges.
salhadaar.phase_normal_strat: Intercept/Kill (One by one in Heroic). Priority on closest orbs.
salhadaar.phase_unbound_desc: At 100 energy, boss takes **+25% damage** for 20 sec.
salhadaar.phase_unbound_strat: Burst Phase (BL) : Avoid the rotating beams (clockwise) (Umbral Beams).
salhadaar.destabilizing_strikes_desc: Swap when DoT stacks become too heavy to survive comfortably.
salhadaar.entropic_unraveling_desc: Burn phase (20s). Massive AoE healing required during rotating beams.
salhadaar.dark_radiation_desc: Do not kill orbs at the same time! Let this 8s DoT expire before killing the next.

vaelgor.title: Vaelgor & Ezzorak
vaelgor.alternatance_desc: Swap bosses after each Gloom by running to the other boss (do not move them). The flying boss uses Grappling Maw.
vaelgor.nullbeam_desc: Aim beam away from raid. Accumulate stacks to reduce Nullzone pull.
vaelgor.placement_tank_desc: NEVER stand behind dragons (Tail Lash / Impale). Keep them >15m apart.
vaelgor.radiant_barrier_desc: Save CDs for Midnight Flames (Intermission). Stay in NPC zone.
vaelgor.targeted_heals_desc: Watch tanks during Nullbeam and targets of Void Howl.
vaelgor.gloom_desc: Rotation of 2 groups of 5 players to soak spheres. Do not soak twice in a row (Diminish).
vaelgor.void_orbs_desc: Absolute priority! Grips, stuns and immediate nukes on these adds.
vaelgor.hp_balance_desc: Bosses must remain within 10% HP diff the entire fight, otherwise 100% damage buff (Twilight Bond). Even DPS split.
vaelgor.bloodlust_tactics_desc: End of fight or during phase swap if raid is struggling.
vaelgor.separation_desc: Imperatively keep both bosses >15m apart to avoid damage buff.
vaelgor.gloom_rotation_desc: Strictly follow the rotation of 2 groups (5 players each) to soak Gloom zones.
vaelgor.duality_desc: Vaelgor and Ezzorak alternate between active combat and air support phases.
vaelgor.phase_1_strat: Tight stack for Void Howl without overlapping. Break tethers, BUT Tank last. Soak Gloom (5 Ranged).
vaelgor.intermission_desc: At 100 Energy: Midnight Flames. Spawn of the Manifestation of Midnight.
vaelgor.intermission_strat: Stack Radiant Barrier: Targeted by a purple circle? Move to the side. Quick nuke on the Manifestation.
vaelgor.tethering_desc: Dragons share HP but must remain separated.
vaelgor.tethering_strat: Distance: Keep Dragons >15m apart to avoid Twilight Fury.
vaelgor.heroic_support_desc: The support phase dragon casts spells more frequently.
vaelgor.gloomtouched_desc: Stacking debuff dealing constant shadow damage.
vaelgor.lightbound_vanguard_desc: Summon light zones to soak to reduce damage taken.
vaelgor.nullzone_desc: The raid breaks its tethers first. The Tank breaks their tether last (the last tether triggers Nullzone Implosion = heavy raid DoT).

lightblinded.title: Lightblinded Vanguard
lightblinded.taunt_swap_desc: Swap targets immediately on Judgment (Bellamy or Lightblood) to avoid Final Verdict one-shot.
lightblinded.placement_desc: Senn stacked on Venel. Bellamy tanked on the other side of the room. Dodge Consecration zones.
lightblinded.aura_devotion_desc: If Bellamy casts his aura, move the other two bosses out of the zone (75% DR).
lightblinded.tyrs_wrath_desc: Intensive healing required immediately: Senn's healing zone must cover the targets, otherwise assured death.
lightblinded.aura_peace_desc: Do not heal/hit Senn inside his blue aura, or you will be pacified.
lightblinded.execution_sentence_desc: NEVER soak. The targeted player moves away, pops an immunity or heavy def CD (it does not split).
lightblinded.focus_senn_desc: Equalize HP but main focus on Senn (Healer) and cleave. Break his Sacred Shield to interrupt the cast.
lightblinded.aura_dodge_desc: Dodge Bellamy's shields (Divine Toll) which silence for 5s.
lightblinded.bloodlust_dps_desc: Wait for Forbearance (2:30-3:00) to avoid boss immunity windows.
lightblinded.bloodlust_global_desc: Wait for Forbearance (around 2m30-3m) to avoid boss immunity windows.
lightblinded.target_priority_desc: Global cleave, but priority target is **War Chaplain Senn** to break his shield, or equalize HP of the three.
lightblinded.sacred_shield_desc: Destroy Senn's shield immediately to interrupt his Blinding Light cast.
lightblinded.three_commanders_desc: The encounter consists of three commanders with synergistic abilities. Aura management is key.
lightblinded.senn_action: Action: Nuke shield, interrupt Blinding Light.
lightblinded.lightblood_management: Management: Split-soak orange zones, dodge hammers.
lightblinded.bellamy_dodge: Dodge: Watch Bellamy and dodge flying shields.
lightblinded.holy_zeal_desc: In Heroic, bosses leave consecration zones and use auras more violently.
lightblinded.consecration_desc: Each boss drops a holy fire zone after their Aura phase.
lightblinded.zealous_spirit_desc: A random boss gains +30% damage. Focus switch required.

chimaerus.title: Chimaerus
chimaerus.alndust_desc: Group soak on the Tank! Split the raid into 2 even groups (e.g. 1 tank, 2 heals, 7 dps).
chimaerus.colossal_horror_desc: Tank this add first in the Aln. It hits harder over time due to Discordant Roar.
chimaerus.insatiable_desc: Keep the boss away from manifestations at all times (or he eats them and gains 100% dmg).
chimaerus.rift_sickness_desc: Healing absorb. Heal the raid heavily when the adds spawn.
chimaerus.caustic_phlegm_desc: Raid-wide DoT for 12s. Prepare your healing CDs.
chimaerus.consuming_miasma_desc: Do not dispel in the raid. Stand in an Alndust pool and call for dispel to clear it.
chimaerus.adds_priority_desc: Focus the Colossal Horror first. Let small adds group up before AoEing them.
chimaerus.interrupts_desc: Mandatory kicks on Fearsome Cry (fear) and Essence Bolt from the Haunting Essence.
chimaerus.stacking_desc: Kill the grouped adds in the same place to minimize Alndust Essence pools.
chimaerus.bloodlust_global_desc: On Pull, Phase 1. Maximize boss damage while adds are manageable.
chimaerus.soak_rotation_desc: Group A takes the first Alndust Upheaval, then Group B takes the next. Alternate every time.
chimaerus.adds_stacking_desc: Kill manifestations in the exact same spot to limit Alndust Essence pools on the ground.
chimaerus.consume_timer_desc: All adds MUST be dead before the boss reaches 100 energy, otherwise wipe.
chimaerus.phase_1_desc: Chimaerus summons Manifestations in the Aln realm. Players hit by Alndust Upheaval gain Alnsight to attack them.
chimaerus.alndust_upheaval_table: Tank Soak. Split damage, gives Alnsight to the group (40s).
chimaerus.alndust_upheaval_action: Group Soak: 1 Tank, 2 Heals, 7 DPS to split it.
chimaerus.rift_emergence_effect: Spawns manifestations + raid healing absorb (Rift Sickness).
chimaerus.rift_emergence_action: Healers, top off the raid. DPS, get ready on adds.
chimaerus.consume_effect: At 100 energy: knockback + eats all living adds (immediate wipe).
chimaerus.consume_action: All adds must be dead before 100 energy!
chimaerus.rending_tear_effect: Frontal cone targeting a player + 6s bleed.
chimaerus.rending_tear_action: Move out of the cone! Don't take a bleed unnecessarily.
chimaerus.consuming_miasma_effect: 1min DoT. Dispel while walking in a pool: clears the pool.
chimaerus.consuming_miasma_action: Strategic dispel ONLY when standing on Alndust pools.
chimaerus.rift_madness_effect: Players in the Aln must be grounded by someone in Reality.
chimaerus.rift_madness_action: Realm swap: Stand under affected players.
chimaerus.dissonance_effect: Damage to all opposite realm players within 8m.
chimaerus.manifestations_desc: Adds spawn in the Aln with an Alnshroud shield. Once broken, they drop into Reality.
chimaerus.colossal_horror_effect: Discordant Roar (+10% dmg/cast). Colossal Strikes (physical + nature).
chimaerus.colossal_horror_action: Absolute priority. Tank the add. The Roar stacks!
chimaerus.haunting_essence_effect: Fearsome Cry (raid fear). Essence Bolt (targeted dmg).
chimaerus.haunting_essence_action: Interrupt Fearsome Cry (fear) and Essence Bolt!
chimaerus.swarming_shade_action: Cleave/AoE once the Colossal Horror is grouped with them.
chimaerus.phase_2_desc: The boss flies away and bombs the raid with Corrupted Devastation (line breath). Baitable!
chimaerus.corrupted_devastation_effect: Line breath. Leaves Alndust pools + spawns adds.
chimaerus.corrupted_devastation_action: Bait the lines! Stack up to preserve space.
chimaerus.alndust_essence_effect: Ground zones left by adds: 50% slow + DoT.
chimaerus.alndust_essence_action: Use the Consuming Miasma dispel to clean them up.
chimaerus.ravenous_dive_effect: Boss crashes down, eating any remaining adds.
chimaerus.ravenous_dive_action: Kill ALL intermission adds before the dive.
chimaerus.ravenous_dive_heroic_effect: Does not consume Alndust pools automatically anymore.
chimaerus.ravenous_dive_heroic_action: Manage pools manually via Miasma dispels.
chimaerus.group_rotation_desc: Group A soaks 1st Upheaval → goes to Aln to kill adds. Boss is separated.
chimaerus.baiting_phase_2_desc: Stack to bait breaths on the edges → keeps the center safe.

beloren.title: Belo'ren, Child of Al'ar
beloren.guardians_edict_desc: Light/Void frontal combo. Each tank soaks their matching color. Missing a frontal buffs the boss +30% damage.
beloren.tank_swap_desc: 5 melee hits after frontals do massive damage. Swap here or use heavy CDs.
beloren.feather_tank_desc: Identify your color (Light/Void). ONLY soak the matching frontal.
beloren.eternal_burns_desc: Healing absorb. Spot heal targeted players to quickly remove it.
beloren.p2_healing_desc: Heavy raid DoT during intermission. Coordinate healing CDs.
beloren.tank_hits_desc: After frontals, the active tank takes 5 huge hits. Urgent spot healing required.
beloren.ember_kill_desc: Kill Ember Phoenixes THEN their eggs to stop rebirth. Interrupt Eruption (only if it matches your color).
beloren.bloodlust_dps_desc: Pop BL/Hero on the Egg in Phase 2! This is the real burn phase.
beloren.orb_gap_desc: Create a gap by absorbing 2-3 orbs of YOUR color, letting the raid pass through.
beloren.bloodlust_desc: On the Egg in Phase 2. This is the burn phase.
beloren.convergence_tactic_desc: Raid is split in 2 teams (Light/Void) via feathers. NEVER interact with mechanics of the opposite color.
beloren.positioning_tactic_desc: Place Dives (expanding puddles) neatly on the edges to preserve room space.
beloren.egg_damage_desc: Each rebirth applies a permanent -10% healing received debuff (Ashen Benediction). It gets harder over time.
beloren.p1_desc: Belo'ren fights as a Phoenix. Players are split into Light and Void teams.
beloren.death_drop_effect: At 0% HP, boss flies up and crashes down. Massive physical damage + knockback.
beloren.death_drop_action: Warlock Gateway near the last puddle. Take it instantly on crash to break the knockback.
beloren.p2_desc: At 0% HP, it becomes an egg casting Rebirth. Nuke the egg here.
beloren.p1_visual_desc: Boss in center. Dives are placed along the outer edges.
beloren.p2_visual_desc: Stand in YOUR color's slice (Light/Void) and maximize DPS on the Egg.

midnight.title: Midnight Raid Guide - Larias

tldr.weapons: Weapons: Raid and vault dropped weapons are competitive again.
tldr.crafting: Crafting: Only craft your first 2 items if you raid. Do not craft beyond that!
tldr.sandbag: Sandbagging: You only bank Heroic Crests for 1 week. Spend them BEFORE stepping into Mythic.
tldr.timeline: Progression: Ilvl increases much faster (e.g. +2.67 ilvl in S3 compared to the old system).
tldr.conversion: Conversion: You can convert Heroic Crests to Mythic ones through an upgrade trick.
tldr.early_access: Early Access: Leveling + Professions only. Spend nothing.
tldr.tokens: Tokens: Omnitoken available Week 3 (Last Boss). Catalyst (charges) unlocked Week 1.
tldr.sparks: Spark Crafting: Wait for Week 2 (March 10) for your 3rd Spark. Dual-wielders can craft a weapon; others should wait or prioritize armor.

alert.title: ⚠️ March 11 Update - Important
alert.li1: Blizzard added a 50% Crest save discount for alts once your main caps out on slots! This makes gearing alts much easier.
alert.li2: Once you unlock your 4-set from any source, ALL content can drop catalyst charges. Doing LFR week 1 is very important to get 4-set early.
alert.li3: The PvP Spark quest is available but DO NOT pick it for the guaranteed hero track neck/ring; you cannot finish it before M+ opens.
alert.li4: Crafting paths have been optimized based on whether you dual-wield, use a 2H weapon, or are a caster. Dual-wielders can craft a weapon preseason, others should wait or craft armor.

intro.structure_desc: Blizzard returns to the Mist/Cata era with a tier split between multiple raids and a staggered release:
intro.w1: Week 1: LFR, Normal, Heroic for Voidspire (6 bosses) and Dreamrift (1 boss). M0 available.
intro.w2: Week 2: Mythic for these raids + M+ unlocked.
intro.w3: Week 3: March on Quel’danas (2 bosses) opens in all difficulties. Contains the Omni-Token and the hardest bosses.
intro.crests_li1: Track-Specific: Crests are now track-specific. 'Hero track' items require ONLY Heroic crests, 'Mythic track' items require ONLY Mythic crests.
intro.crests_li2: No More Valorstones! Replaced by a minimal gold cost.
intro.crests_li3: Champion Track Nerf: Normal difficulty items are much less powerful. Items cap at 6/6 Champion = 2/6 Hero.
intro.crests_li4: Fixed Costs: The cost is now 20 crests per rank, from 1/6 up to 6/6.
intro.crests_li5: Cap: Increased to 100 (instead of 90). This gives you 5 upgrades per week (instead of 6).
intro.upgrade_li1: Heroic Crests useful: You can effectively convert Heroic crests to Mythic crests with the upgrade trick.
intro.upgrade_li2: Weapons: 1H and 2H dropped or vault weapons remain great options.
intro.upgrade_li3: Mythic Trick: If 1/6 Mythic drop: max the Hero version first for a free Mythic upgrade (essentially converting 20 Hero crests into 20 Myth crests).

systems.title: New Systems
systems.tokens_li1: Tokens are separated by armor type AND by raid (Prefix 'Aln-' for Dreamrift, 'Void-' for Voidspire).
systems.tokens_li2: The Omnitoken arrives only in Week 3.
systems.tokens_li3: Important: Once the 4-set is obtained, ALL content can drop catalyst charges. Doing LFR to grab pieces quickly is therefore very profitable to unlock this.
systems.prey_li1: Prey: New system sharing the 'Weekly Heroic' reward with Delves. Delves will likely remain superior for farming crests.
systems.prey_li2: Consumables: Return of classics + a new 'Crit Damage' ring enchant and an embellishment doubling JC trinket effects.
systems.prey_li3: Renown: No raid renown apparently. Mainly useful for profession recipes.

sandbag.title: Why 'Sandbag' (Hoard Crests)?
sandbag.desc1: Blizzard incentivizes players to 'sandbag' (hold onto) their equipment for the first week.
sandbag.desc2: The golden rule: Spend your heroic crests at the end of Week 2 reclear, right before stepping into Mythic.
sandbag.li1: You now only hold them for 1 short week to avoid wasting crests on slots you might rapidly replace.
sandbag.li2: Heroic crests will eventually become useless around W6, but helps for the upgrade trick.
sandbag.li3: Mythic Trick: If you get a Mythic 1/6 item, upgrade its Hero version to 6/6 (20 hero crests) to benefit from free Mythic upgrades!

ea.title: Early Access (Feb 26 - Mar 3)
ea.quote: "Midnight Early Access is Pay to Win if you do not have unlimited time."
ea.li1: Level any character you plan to play. M0s available at reset.
ea.li4: Crafters/Renown: Minimize side quests until DMF bonus.

pre_w1.title: Pre-Season Week 1 (Mar 3)
pre_w1.subtitle: M0 available (reduced ilvl)
pre_w1.li3: M0 World Tour: On each char (3/6 Veteran, 240 ilvl). Do not upgrade.
pre_w1.li4: Level Renown: Singularity (7), Hara’ti (8), Silvermoon (9), Amani (9) for Champion pieces (use DMF!).
pre_w1.li5: Do Loremaster with DMF if aiming for Renown.

pre_w2.title: Pre-Season Week 2 (Mar 10)
pre_w2.subtitle: M0 available (reduced ilvl)
pre_w2.li2: Complete weekly Spark quest from Lady Liadrin for your 3rd Spark.
pre_w2.li4_sub1: Save 160 Veteran crests for crafting 2x Veteran items with Embellishments (Do not take Sparks).

s1_w1.title: Week 1 - Heroic Week (Mar 17)
s1_w1.subtitle: M0 available (Full ilvl)
s1_w1.li1: DO NOT SPEND HERO OR MYTH CRESTS.
s1_w1.li2: Do LFR for tier pieces (to unlock Catalyst faster).
s1_w1.li4: World Boss / Bountiful Delves: Look for 'Cracked Keystone' quest.
s1_w1.li5_sub1: Spend Veteran/Champion Crests to fully upgrade.
s1_w1.li5_sub2: Craft 2 pieces 246 with 80x Veteran Crests if not done.
s1_w1.li6: Clear Normal and Heroic. Only spend Heroic Crests if absolute BiS trinket/set piece.

s1_w2.title: Week 2 - Mythic Week (Mar 24) - M+ Open
s1_w2.desc: (The week you should take time off)
s1_w2.li1: M+: Farm +10s for 3/6 Hero (266 ilvl), vault slots and crests.
s1_w2.li4: BEFORE Mythic: Upgrade ~11 items from 3/6 to 4/6 (269) for 220 Hero Crests.
s1_w2.li5: Mythic Trick: If 1/6 Mythic drop: max the Hero version first for a free Mythic upgrade.
s1_w2.li6: Total Crests spent: 220/220 Heroic. End of week: ~4x 266, 11x 269.

w3.title: Week 3 - Final Raid Opens (Mar 31)
w3.li1: Vault: Myth track item 272+ (2H weapon is great!).
w3.li2: Crafting: Craft a 2H Mythic 5/6 (285) for 80 Myth Crests unless looted.
w3.li3: M+ & Raid: Farm +10s/+12s. Reclear raid (LFR for 4p if missing).
w3.li4_sub1: Hero: Upgrade 2 of your 4/6 269 items to 6/6 276 for 80 Heroic Crests. Save 20 Heroic Crests.
w3.li4_sub2: Myth: Upgrade 1/6 272 Myth track item to 6/6 289 for 80 Myth crests.
w3.li4_sub3: Conversion Trick: Max the Hero version of the slot to 6/6 first with the 20 Hero crests.

w4.title: Week 4 (Apr 7)
w4.li2_sub1: Hero: 2 items 4/6 to 6/6 (80 Hero). Keep 20 for conversion trick.
w4.li2_sub2: Myth: Upgrade Vault item 1/6 to 6/6 (80 Mythic) utilizing the trick.

w6.title: Week 6 (April 21) - Done with Heroic Crests
w6.li1: Farm +12s for vault slots and all Crests.
w6.li2: Upgrade your Heroic items to 6/6 276. You are done with Heroic Crests!
w6.li3: Upgrade raid drop 2/6 myth track to 5/6 285.

w7.title: Week 7+ (April 28)
w7.li1: Do not craft any slot if you can get pieces from vault higher than 1/6.
w7.li2: Upgrade Mythic items as you get them to 6/6 289.

midnight.citation: Original guide by Larias. Feel free to buy him a coffee.

craft.title: Spark Crafting Advice (Updated March 10)
craft.dw_title: Dual-Wield Path (DH, Monk, Sin/Sub, Surv, Fury, Enh)
craft.dw_desc: Craft a weapon with an embellishment NOW. You can craft it with no crests and update it with Mythic Crests later. You only need to hold 80 Veteran Crests. Fury Warriors craft when they get 4 sparks.
craft.2h_desc: Path 1: Craft a mythic 2H ASAP (get a 5/6 eq for 80 Myth Crests). Path 2: Upgrade a 3/6H 2H from M+ to 6/6H and craft in 2 other spots for double embellishments.
